commits: 723c8c9: docs(0.5.1-SET-warnratio): design memo — single budget_warn_ratio + isolation fix
2251289: test(0.5.1-SET-warnratio): RED — single budget_warn_ratio drives monitor warn + router swap
a410abd: test(0.5.1): autouse conftest fixture resets router catalog for test isolation
monitor_note: SET-unify did NOT move the monitor warn-ratio read onto get_settings(). At base f2706e9 the monitor still owned _DEFAULT_BUDGET_WARN_RATIO=0.8 + _budget_warn_ratio() (env-only override, ignored airlock_settings.budget_warn_ratio). Both the monitor side AND the router side were unified in this pack.
behavior_change_2: Router proactive-swap point moved from hardcoded 0.9 to the configured budget_warn_ratio (default 0.8). Recorded in CHANGELOG.md Unreleased/Changed. X-Airlock-Model-Override and X-Airlock-Budget-State: near_limit now fire at the same tunable point.
smoketest_scenario_added: dev/smoketest/README.md — new '## Scenario — budget warn-ratio (0.5.1 SET-warnratio)' section: stand up isolated instance with low AIRLOCK_PROVIDER_BUDGETS + AIRLOCK_BUDGET_WARN_RATIO, drive billed calls, assert X-Airlock-Budget-State: near_limit and X-Airlock-Model-Override fire at the configured ratio. Marked 'agent did NOT run this' — operator runs at sign-off on a separate dir+port.
changelog_updated: CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] > Changed — single configurable budget_warn_ratio + behavior-change #2 documented.

tests.combined_order_check: uv run --extra test python -m pytest tests/test_fast_router.py tests/test_fast_guardian.py -q => 120 passed (both guardian failover tests green); a catalog-populating-probe + tests/test_fast_guardian.py => 39 passed (FAILED 2 before the conftest fix).
tests.fast_subsystem_sweep: tests/test_fast_router.py test_fast_monitor.py test_fast_settings.py test_fast_guardian.py test_fast_circuit_breaker.py test_fast_spend_store.py => 233 passed

blockers_encountered.description: The prompt's exact RED command (pytest tests/test_fast_router.py tests/test_fast_guardian.py) PASSES at base f2706e9 because test_fast_router.py has a local _reset_router_config autouse teardown that clears the catalog, masking the order-dependence.
blockers_encountered.resolution: Confirmed the order-dependence is real via a catalog-populating probe (a test that calls set_router_config with a model_list and does NOT clean up) placed before tests/test_fast_guardian.py: that reproduced the 2 guardian failover FAILURES ('skipping failover=... not in model_list catalog'). Added the robust global fix (autouse conftest catalog reset); the probe now passes 39, and the prompt's command passes 120. Documented in the design memo.

additional_changes_made_in_scope: Reformatted one test method signature in tests/test_fast_router.py (ruff format) — included in the GREEN commit.
Kept settings._DEFAULT_BUDGET_WARN_RATIO (canonical, DO NOT TOUCH) and only deleted the monitor/router duplicates.
preexisting_unrelated_failure: tests/test_fathom_init.py::test_init_engine_with_fathomdb FAILS in isolation (init_engine returns None when the fathomdb optional dep is not installed under the --extra test env). Not order-dependent on the conftest fixture, does not touch router/monitor/conftest catalog — pre-existing/environmental, NOT caused by this pack.
agent_verify_result: pass (warn-ratio + isolation targets green; fast sweep 233 passed; full suite 2181 passed with 1 pre-existing unrelated fathomdb failure)
next_step_for_orchestrator: Pack 0.5.1-SET-warnratio on branch feat/0.5.1-SET-warnratio at a410abd; review the two separate commits (warn-ratio 3191c3c, isolation fix a410abd), run the dev/smoketest warn-ratio scenario on a separate dir+port at sign-off, verify, merge.
